channel.title: PostgreSQL on w3shubh
channel.description: Recent content in PostgreSQL on w3shubh

item.title: Pandora: Architecting AI Agents for D2C Brands
item.description:
After nearly five years of scaling backend systems and AI features at an enterprise level, I took the leap to build something of my own. [cite_start]In September 2025, I co-founded Pandora[cite: 37, 38, 39].

[cite_start]Our mission was to build a full-stack AI platform specifically engineered for Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) brands[cite: 40]. These brands deal with massive volumes of customer interactions across varied channels and require highly context-aware, autonomous systems—not just basic chatbots. Here is a look at how I architected the platform from the ground up.
